response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable generalist engineer with roughly 20 years of broad technical experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains, and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling via MCP work at re:cinq. However, the role demands a director-level individual contributor with deep, recognized AI/ML expertise, cloud platform strategy experience at scale, and a track record of advising enterprise customers — none of which are substantiated in this resume. His AI involvement is nascent (beginning April 2025), his title trajectory peaks at Staff/Senior Engineer, and there is no evidence of thought leadership, advanced AI credentials, or strategic advisory work at the level this position requires.
strengths: ~20 years of diverse engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure across multiple industries and geographies
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators at re:cinq, demonstrating willingness to engage with emerging AI tooling
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform actively used in production by NGOs
concerns: AI expertise is superficial and very recent (April 2025 onward) — far short of the recognized, demonstrated AI product/platform leadership the role requires
Career progression caps at Staff/Senior Engineer with no evidence of director-level IC scope, cross-organizational influence, or executive advisory experience
No cloud platform strategy background, no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and no track record of advising strategic customers or partners at enterprise scale
